audit_scope: public/ and src/assets/ against src/** imports

notes.audio_ogg: SFXService (src/audio/SFXService.ts) lists SFX_FILES constant with only 6 keys (correct, incorrect, complete, perfectFanfare, streak, snap). All other .ogg files appear to be legacy assets from earlier prototypes or sound design iterations. Safe to remove in Phase 3.
notes.icons_png: favicon-32.png and apple-touch-icon.png are referenced in index.html (lines 14-15) as manifest icons. The remaining 6 icons (icon-192*, icon-512*, and screenshots) are PWA manifest placeholders and documentation assets — not referenced in HTML but are standard PWA bundle files. Retention recommended for PWA robustness.
notes.fonts_woff2: All fonts declared in src/styles/index.css @font-face rules (lines 8-42). All 5 fonts are used; none are orphans.

phase_3_action: Audio orphans (58 .ogg files): most are likely intentional legacy assets retained for future feature work (e.g., tone.ogg, zap*.ogg may be for future interaction types or UI sounds). Do NOT auto-delete without curriculum/design review.
PWA icons (icon-192*, icon-512* + screenshots): are standard PWA manifest assets and are not 'orphaned' — retain for PWA robustness and documentation. No deletion recommended.
Once decision is made to delete audio orphans, batch-delete via git or manual deletion. Verify no curriculum specs or hidden comments reference the deleted files.
recommendations.bundle_impact: 58 orphan .ogg files × ~30–50 KB each = ~1.7–2.9 MB of wasted disk space. Runtime impact: 0 KB (SFXService only preloads SFX_FILES list, not all *.ogg in folder). Safe to defer deletion to Phase 3 cleanup pass.
recommendations.false_positives: PWA icons (6 files) and screenshots (2 files) are correctly retained despite not being explicitly imported in TypeScript — they are referenced in manifest.json and are essential PWA bundle files.
